title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_turn_builder.py (第 1 至 185 行，共 185 行) ---
   1 | # tests/test_turn_builder.py
   2 | """Tests for provider-safe conversation turn construction."""
   3 | 
   4 | import pytest
   5 | 
   6 | from core.compression_engine import CompressionEngine, CompressionStrategy
   7 | from core.turn_builder import TurnBuilder
   8 | 
   9 | 
  10 | def tool_call(call_id: str, name: str = "echo"):
  11 |     return {
  12 |         "id": call_id,
  13 |         "type": "function",
  14 |         "function": {"name": name, "arguments": "{}"},
  15 |     }
  16 | 
  17 | 
  18 | def assert_valid_openai_tool_pairs(messages):
  19 |     for i, msg in enumerate(messages):
  20 |         if msg.get("role") == "assistant" and msg.get("tool_calls"):
  21 |             expected_ids = {tc["id"] for tc in msg["tool_calls"]}
  22 |             contiguous_ids = set()
  23 |             j = i + 1
  24 |             while j < len(messages) and messages[j].get("role") == "tool":
  25 |                 contiguous_ids.add(messages[j].get("tool_call_id"))
  26 |                 j += 1
  27 |             assert expected_ids.issubset(contiguous_ids)
  28 | 
  29 |         if msg.get("role") == "tool":
  30 |             block_start = i
  31 |             while block_start > 0 and messages[block_start - 1].get("role") == "tool":
  32 |                 block_start -= 1
  33 |             assert block_start > 0
  34 |             prev_msg = messages[block_start - 1]
  35 |             assert prev_msg.get("role") == "assistant" and prev_msg.get("tool_calls")
  36 |             assert msg.get("tool_call_id") in {tc["id"] for tc in prev_msg["tool_calls"]}
  37 | 
  38 | 
  39 | def test_turn_builder_keeps_plain_messages_as_individual_turns():
  40 |     messages = [
  41 |         {"role": "user", "content": "hello"},
  42 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "hi"},
  43 |         {"role": "user", "content": "next"},
  44 |     ]
  45 | 
  46 |     builder = TurnBuilder()
  47 |     turns = builder.build(messages)
  48 | 
  49 |     assert len(turns) == 3
  50 |     assert [turn.messages for turn in turns] == [[msg] for msg in messages]
  51 |     assert builder.flatten(turns) == messages
  52 |     assert all(turn.is_valid_openai_tool_turn for turn in turns)
  53 | 
  54 | 
  55 | def test_turn_builder_groups_complete_openai_tool_call_pair_atomically():
  56 |     messages = [
  57 |         {"role": "user", "content": "run tools"},
  58 |         {
  59 |             "role": "assistant",
  60 |             "content": "",
  61 |             "tool_calls": [tool_call("call_1"), tool_call("call_2")],
  62 |         },
  63 |         {"role": "tool", "tool_call_id": "call_1", "name": "echo", "content": "one"},
  64 |         {"role": "tool", "tool_call_id": "call_2", "name": "echo", "content": "two"},
  65 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "done"},
  66 |     ]
  67 | 
  68 |     turns = TurnBuilder().build(messages)
  69 | 
  70 |     assert len(turns) == 3
  71 |     tool_turn = turns[1]
  72 |     assert tool_turn.start_index == 1
  73 |     assert tool_turn.end_index == 3
  74 |     assert tool_turn.messages == messages[1:4]
  75 |     assert tool_turn.has_tool_calls
  76 |     assert tool_turn.is_tool_pair_complete
  77 |     assert tool_turn.is_valid_openai_tool_turn
  78 |     assert tool_turn.missing_tool_call_ids == []
  79 |     assert tool_turn.orphan_tool_call_ids == []
  80 | 
  81 | 
  82 | def test_turn_builder_marks_missing_tool_response_incomplete():
  83 |     messages = [
  84 |         {
  85 |             "role": "assistant",
  86 |             "content": "",
  87 |             "tool_calls": [tool_call("call_missing")],
  88 |         },
  89 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "next message interrupts tool block"},
  90 |     ]
  91 | 
  92 |     turns = TurnBuilder().build(messages)
  93 | 
  94 |     assert len(turns) == 2
  95 |     assert turns[0].has_tool_calls
  96 |     assert not turns[0].is_tool_pai...
